data.title: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley report strong multi-month rallies with mixed Q4 results and advances, as per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Goldman Sachs, a leading financial firm, reported varied results on Thursday, while Morgan Stanley showed progress with a strong performance in Q4. Both companies are experiencing multi-month rallies following their latest reports.

data.title: Curately.ai partners with LaborEdge to offer AI staffing innovation for healthcare agencies using NexusATS platform.
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia and Novi, Michigan, on January 15, 2026, Curately.ai and LaborEdge have entered into a strategic partnership to introduce advanced recruiting automation to healthcare staffing agencies through LaborEdge's NexusATS platform. This collaboration will provide agencies with access to cutting-edge technology for streamlining their recruitment processes and enhancing efficiency.

data.title: McDanel Advanced Materials and Richland Glass merge in a strategic move on Jan. 15, 2026, as Artemis portfolio companies.
data.description: In Beaver Falls, Pennsylvania, and Vineland, New Jersey, on January 15, 2026, McDanel Advanced Materials ("McDanel") and Richland Glass ("Richland"), both portfolio companies of Artemis, revealed their successful merger. This strategic move unites two companies specializing in material science, leveraging their synergies for mutual benefit and growth.

data.title: Matthew McConaughey takes a stand against AI misuse of his voice, armed with new trademarks and embracing tech cautiously.
data.description: McConaughey has obtained federal trademarks to protect against AI voice theft, equipping him with new tools. However, he is also open to embracing technology in his own way.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor's stock surge created $6 billion wealth for top investors like Ken Fisher, Laffont, and Sanders. TSM stock climbed 68% in the past year from $207 to above $347.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd (NYSE: TSM) outperformed earnings expectations, leading to a surge in the stock to new record levels. The company demonstrated impressive growth with its stock rising approximately 68% in the past year, from $207 in mid-January 2025 to over $347 in premarket trading. This significant increase has prompted a reassessment of investor positions and highlighted the substantial wealth accumulation for long-term holders due to the AI rally. The details of this market development can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Seasats receives $24M funding from DoW to accelerate autonomous vessels fielding.
data.description: A well-known developer of long-endurance autonomous surface vessels, Seasats, disclosed on January 15, 2026, that it has been chosen by the Department of War (DoW) to be a recipient of an award as part of the initiative to speed up the procurement and deployment of innovative technologies.

data.title: Udemy and Indeed report on upskilling gaps, workers ahead of employers in skill building. Disconnect arises as employees prep for future, employers focused on current job openings.
data.description: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a worldwide AI-driven skills enhancement platform, released new research in partnership with Indeed, the top job site globally, and a key job matching platform. The study, named “The Future-Proofing Instinct,” highlights a notable disparity between workers and companies. It shows that workers are actively enhancing their skills for tomorrow, yet numerous organizations are primarily concerned with filling current job vacancies. This emphasizes the evolving dynamic in the job market as employees strive to future-proof themselves while employers prioritize immediate hiring needs.

data.title: Medius earns Solutions Partner designation for certified software from Microsoft, meeting program requirements.
data.description: A software company named Medius has recently been recognized for its achievement in developing software solutions on the Microsoft Cloud platform that adhere to interoperability standards and fulfill program criteria. The announcement was made on January 15, 2026, in Jacksonville, Florida. Medius, which is a partner of Microsoft, disclosed that they have received a special designation for their work in this area.

data.title: Crayola launches 'Creative Styles Tool' in 2026 to help adults discover their creative styles for boosting confidence.
data.description: The unveiling of the 'Creative Styles Tool' aims to personalize creativity by offering insights to enhance creative confidence and promote collaboration. Crayola, a renowned brand for sparking colorful self-expression and creativity, revealed this innovation on Jan. 15, 2026, in Easton, Pa. The tool is designed to provide tailored recommendations and foster a sense of shared creativity.

data.title: Coinbase withdraws support for Clarity Act draft bill, causing a delay in today's markup session. #crypto #news
data.description: Brian Armstrong and his team have announced their inability to endorse the current draft bill, causing a postponement of the scheduled markup for today.

data.title: ManageEngine named a Challenger in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Management Tools, scores above 4/5 in all 4 use cases.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, ManageEngine, a part of Zoho Corporation and a major player in enterprise IT management solutions, has been deemed a Challenger in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Management Tools. Out of the 18 vendors assessed, ManageEngine scored over 4 out of 5 in all four Gartner Critical Capabilities Use Cases - autonomous endpoint management (4.40/5), unified endpoint management (4.10/5), security-centric management (4.36/5), and frontl.
